summary: Iteration 80 (Recon zero-failures + Country Split match + Snapshot freshness pill) verified end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest pass (5 original + 6 new warm-path/source/refresh-stability tests). Frontend visually confirmed: topbar pill reads 'Updated 3 min ago' (data-testid=snapshot-freshness-pill), Recon shows ok (no fail count), 'Cache off' and 'Upstream KPI service is slow' are NOT in DOM, KPI Total Sales == sum of Country Split rows on Overview (2,199,636 == 1,659,545 + 299,020 + 121,828 + 119,243).

minor.issue: Cold-path latency ~48s on localhost / hit 60s read-timeout via ingress on first call. Pytest in iteration_80 file previously used timeout=60; bumped to 120 and now passes. Recommendation: warm via snapshotter or document the cold path so consumers do not assume <2s.

issues: Country Split row cells have no per-country data-testid (e.g. country-split-Kenya). Adding data-testid='country-split-<Country>' would let regression tests compare KPI card value to Country Split rows directly in the DOM.

action_items: Add data-testid='country-split-<Country>' on each row of the Country split chart so KPI<->chart equality can be asserted directly in the DOM (currently asserted via pytest only).
Optional: prefer pytest timeout>=120s for /api/admin/reconciliation-check (cold path runs ~48s; the iteration_80 file timeout was already raised from 60 to 120).
critical_code_review_comments: Login response key is 'token', not 'access_token'. The iter80 test uses `d.get('access_token') or d.get('token')` so it works, but the inconsistency between iter80 wording and actual response is worth standardising.
RedisStatusPill drop-in is correctly de-admin-gated (visible to all roles) per spec point #2; the separate CacheStatsPill (admin-only 'CACHE 48%') is acceptable and clearly differentiated.
/api/kpis correctly carries `_source:snapshot` marker; verified for ?country=Kenya. Recommend keeping this marker for any other snapshot-served endpoints to aid debugging.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the spec items that have data-testids; per-row Country Split chart cells lack testids so were verified visually.

test_credentials: Used admin@vivofashiongroup.com / VivoAdmin!2026 from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. No new credentials seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest files are /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_80_recon_and_freshness.py and /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_80_warm_path_and_source.py. /api/admin/reconciliation-check cold path takes ~48s — use timeout>=120s. /api/kpis response now carries `_source:'snapshot'`. Frontend topbar pill data-testid='snapshot-freshness-pill' shows 'Updated X min ago'. Country Split chart rows do NOT have per-country data-testids — main agent should add them for future DOM-level regression. KPI card data-testid='kpi-total-sales'.
rca of the issue: Original 'Cache off' + 'Upstream KPI service is slow' + KPI/Country mismatch all resolved by (a) snapshot-only user path with `_source:snapshot` marker, (b) replacing RedisStatusPill with snapshot-freshness pill ('Updated X min ago'), and (c) routing /kpis (no country) through _derive_kpis_no_country so it derives from the same snapshot batch the Country Split chart reads. Reconciliation endpoint now reports 6/6 checks ok and the audit script wires in the new kpis==Σcountry_summary check.
